sentences.target: Ich koche heute Poulet mit Reis.

translations.de: Ich koche heute Poulet mit Reis.
translations.en: I'm cooking chicken with rice today.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, je cuisine du poulet avec du riz.
translations.ru: Сегодня я готовлю курицу с рисом.
translations.pt: Hoje vou fazer frango com arroz.
translations.he: היום אני מבשל עוף עם אורז.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi nấu gà với cơm.
translations.nl: Vandaag kook ik kip met rijst.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я готую курку з рисом.
translations.hi: आज मैं चिकन और चावल पका रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag lager jeg kylling med ris.
translations.id: Hari ini saya memasak ayam dengan nasi.
translations.sv: I dag lagar jag kyckling med ris.
translations.da: I dag laver jeg kylling med ris.
translations.ja: 今日は鶏肉とご飯を作ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular (verb-second); predicates the action of the subject.
Temporal adverb specifying time.
Neuter noun, singular; direct object in the accusative of 'koche'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a comitative PP ('mit Reis').
Masculine noun, singular; object of the dative-governing preposition 'mit' (bare dative without article).

sentences.target: Wir kaufen frisches Poulet beim Metzger.

translations.de: Wir kaufen frisches Poulet beim Metzger.
translations.en: We are buying fresh chicken at the butcher's.
translations.es: Compramos pollo fresco en la carnicería.
translations.fr: Nous achetons du poulet frais chez le boucher.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在肉铺买新鲜的鸡肉。
translations.ru: Мы покупаем свежую курицу в мясной лавке.
translations.pt: Estamos comprando frango fresco no açougue.
translations.he: אנחנו קונים עוף טרי אצל הקצב.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi mua gà tươi ở hàng thịt.
translations.ar: نشتري دجاجًا طازجًا من عند الجزار.
translations.nl: We kopen verse kip bij de slager.
translations.uk: Ми купуємо свіжу курку в м’ясній крамниці.
translations.hi: हम कसाई की दुकान से ताज़ा चिकन खरीद रहे हैं.
translations.el: Αγοράζουμε φρέσκο κοτόπουλο από τον χασάπη.
translations.nb: Vi kjøper fersk kylling hos slakteren.
translations.id: Kami membeli ayam segar di tukang daging.
translations.sv: Vi köper färsk kyckling hos slaktaren.
translations.ro: Cumpărăm pui proaspăt de la măcelar.
translations.da: Vi køber frisk kylling hos slagteren.
translations.ja: 私たちは精肉店で新鮮な鶏肉を買います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Attributive adjective, positive degree; agrees with 'Poulet' in case/number/gender (accusative neuter singular).
Neuter noun, singular; direct object in the accusative of 'kaufen'.
Contraction of 'bei dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Masculine noun, singular; object of 'bei' in dative ('beim Metzger').

sentences.target: Das Poulet aus dem Ofen schmeckt super.
sentences.reading: /das puˈleː aʊs deːm ˈoːfən ʃmɛkt ˈzuːpɐ/

translations.de: Das Poulet aus dem Ofen schmeckt super.
translations.ipa: /das puˈleː aʊs deːm ˈoːfən ʃmɛkt ˈzuːpɐ/
translations.en: The chicken from the oven tastes great.
translations.es: El pollo al horno está riquísimo.
translations.fr: Le poulet au four est délicieux.
translations.it: Il pollo al forno è buonissimo.
translations.yue: 焗爐焗出嚟嘅雞好好食。
translations.pt: O frango assado no forno está uma delícia.
translations.nl: De kip uit de oven is heerlijk.
translations.hu: A sütőben sült csirke nagyon finom.
translations.hi: ओवन में बना चिकन बहुत स्वादिष्ट है.
translations.el: Το κοτόπουλο από τον φούρνο είναι πεντανόστιμο.
translations.id: Ayam dari oven rasanya enak sekali.
translations.ro: Puiul la cuptor este foarte gustos.
translations.da: Kyllingen fra ovnen smager rigtig godt.
translations.fi: Uunissa paistettu kana on tosi hyvää.
translations.ja: オーブンで焼いた鶏肉はとてもおいしいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative neuter singular; determiner of 'Poulet'.
Neuter noun, singular; head of the subject NP.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a source PP modifying 'Poulet'.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of 'Ofen'.
Masculine noun, singular; object of 'aus' in dative within the postnominal PP.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicates the taste quality of the subject.
Adverb of manner/degree modifying 'schmeckt'.

sentences.target: Im Restaurant bestelle ich Poulet mit Salat.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ʁɛstoˈʁɑ̃ː bəˈʃtɛlə ɪç puˈleː mɪt zaˈlaːt/

translations.de: Im Restaurant bestelle ich Poulet mit Salat.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ʁɛstoˈʁɑ̃ː bəˈʃtɛlə ɪç puˈleː mɪt zaˈlaːt/
translations.en: At the restaurant I order chicken with salad.
translations.es: En el restaurante pido pollo con ensalada.
translations.fr: Au restaurant, je commande du poulet avec de la salade.
translations.it: Al ristorante ordino pollo con insalata.
translations.zh-Hans: 在餐馆我点鸡肉配沙拉。
translations.ru: В ресторане я заказываю курицу с салатом.
translations.pt: No restaurante eu peço frango com salada.
translations.he: במסעדה אני מזמין עוף עם סלט.
translations.tr: Restoranda tavuk ve salata sipariş ediyorum.
translations.vi: Ở nhà hàng tôi gọi gà với sa lát.
translations.ar: في المطعم أطلب دجاجًا مع سلطة.
translations.nl: In het restaurant bestel ik kip met salade.
translations.uk: У ресторані я замовляю курку з салатом.
translations.hi: रेस्टोरेंट में मैं सलाद के साथ चिकन ऑर्डर करता हूँ.
translations.pl: W restauracji zamawiam kurczaka z sałatką.
translations.el: Στο εστιατόριο παραγγέλνω κοτόπουλο με σαλάτα.
translations.nb: På restauranten bestiller jeg kylling med salat.
translations.id: Di restoran saya memesan ayam dengan salad.
translations.sv: På restaurangen beställer jag kyckling med sallad.
translations.ro: La restaurant comand pui cu salată.
translations.cs: V restauraci si objednávám kuře se salátem.
translations.da: På restauranten bestiller jeg kylling med salat.
translations.ja: レストランで鶏肉とサラダを注文します。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; forms a fronted locative PP.
Neuter noun, singular; object of 'in' in dative within the PP.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; V2 position after the fronted PP.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; postverbal subject.
Neuter noun, singular; direct object in the accusative of 'bestelle'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces an accompanying PP.
Masculine noun, singular; object of 'mit' in dative.
